title: Reported impact snapshot | Gaza Strip (3 June 2026)
summary: Figures that are yet-to-be verified by the UN are attributed to their source. Casualty numbers have been provided by the Ministry of Health (MoH) and the Israeli authorities. The fatality breakdowns currently cited are those that the MoH in Gaza has fully identified as of 31 December 2025 out of the higher number of casualties they report. title: Humanitarian Situation Report | 5 June 2026
summary: Over the past two weeks, violence, military operations, and movement restrictions have resulted in casualties, damaged homes and infrastructure, driven new and prolonged displacement, and limited access to essential services, livelihoods, and humanitarian aid. Increasingly, they are placing strain on an already fragile , as disrupted markets, rising living costs, and declining household incomes make it harder for people to meet their basic needs.
